verses.genz_hook: Buat kamu yang lagi ngerasa semua beban datang barengan.
verses.translation_en: For indeed, with hardship will be ease.

verses.genz_hook: Allah ngulang ini dua kali. Bukan kebetulan.
verses.translation_en: Indeed, with hardship will be ease.

verses.genz_hook: Allah tau batas kamu. Dia ga akan kasih lebih dari yang kamu sanggup.
verses.translation_en: Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear.

verses.genz_hook: Kalau udah serahin ke Allah, Dia yang urus sisanya.
verses.translation_en: And whoever relies upon Allah — then He is sufficient for him.

verses.genz_hook: Stop ngerasa lemah. Kamu lebih kuat dari yang kamu kira.
verses.translation_en: Do not weaken and do not grieve, and you will be superior if you are true believers.

verses.genz_hook: Seberapa jauh pun kamu ngerasa udah 'kejauhan' — pintu ini belum tutup.
verses.translation_en: Do not despair of the mercy of Allah. Indeed, Allah forgives all sins.

verses.genz_hook: Di saat kamu ngerasa ga ada yang ngerti — Dia lebih dekat dari urat nadimu sendiri.
verses.translation_en: We are closer to him than his jugular vein.

verses.genz_hook: Ga perlu perantara. Ga perlu nunggu. Dia langsung dengerin.
verses.translation_en: I am near. I respond to the invocation of the supplicant when he calls upon Me.

verses.genz_hook: Waktu semua orang ninggalin — ada yang bilang 'jangan sedih, Allah bersama kita'.
verses.translation_en: Do not grieve; indeed Allah is with us.

verses.genz_hook: Allah ga pernah ninggalin kamu. Meski rasanya sepi banget.
verses.translation_en: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, nor has He detested you.

verses.genz_hook: Kamu diciptakan dalam bentuk yang sebaik-baiknya. Bukan kebetulan.
verses.translation_en: We have certainly created man in the best of stature.

verses.genz_hook: Allah muliakan manusia. Termasuk kamu — exactly as you are.
verses.translation_en: We have honored the children of Adam.

verses.genz_hook: Stop bandingin hidupmu sama orang lain di FYP. Rezekim sendiri udah dijamin.
verses.translation_en: Do not wish for what Allah has given some of you over others.

verses.genz_hook: Ga ada yang lebih tinggi karena followers, harta, atau keturunan. Yang beda cuma taqwa.
verses.translation_en: Indeed, the most noble of you in the sight of Allah is the most righteous of you.

verses.genz_hook: Usahamu ga akan pernah sia-sia. Setiap gerak itu dicatat.
verses.translation_en: And that there is not for man except that for which he strives.

verses.genz_hook: Allah ga akan ubah nasibmu sampai kamu sendiri yang mulai bergerak.
verses.translation_en: Allah will not change the condition of a people until they change what is in themselves.

verses.genz_hook: Rezekim udah ada. Tugas kamu cuma jalan dan jemput.
verses.translation_en: There is no creature on earth but that its provision is due from Allah.

verses.genz_hook: Udah selesai satu hal? Langsung cari yang berikutnya. Jangan nganggur.
verses.translation_en: So when you have finished your duties, then stand up for worship.

verses.genz_hook: Ngejar dunia boleh. Tapi jangan sampe lupa bagianmu di akhirat.
verses.translation_en: Seek the home of the Hereafter, but do not forget your share of the world.

verses.genz_hook: Kehilangan itu nyata. Dan kamu boleh ngerasa sakit.
verses.translation_en: We will surely test you with fear and hunger and loss of wealth and lives and fruits.

verses.genz_hook: Kalimat yang paling ikhlas yang pernah ada — untuk setiap kehilangan.
verses.translation_en: Indeed we belong to Allah, and indeed to Him we will return.

verses.genz_hook: Nabi Yaqub nangis sampai buta. Kesedihan itu manusiawi.
verses.translation_en: I only complain of my suffering and my grief to Allah.

verses.genz_hook: Hari ini mungkin masih gelap. Tapi ada hari yang lebih baik yang dijanjikan.
verses.translation_en: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.

verses.genz_hook: Putus asa dari rahmat Allah — itu yang dilarang. Bukan ngerasa sedihnya.
verses.translation_en: Do not despair of relief from Allah. Indeed, no one despairs of relief from Allah except the disbelieving people.

verses.genz_hook: Jalan keluar itu ada. Kadang datang dari arah yang ga kamu sangka.
verses.translation_en: Whoever fears Allah — He will make for him a way out.

verses.genz_hook: Dua senjata yang paling underrated: sabar dan sholat.
verses.translation_en: Seek help through patience and prayer. Indeed, it is a burden except for the humble.

verses.genz_hook: Waktu semua terasa melawan — cukup bilang ini.
verses.translation_en: Sufficient for us is Allah, and He is the best Disposer of affairs.

verses.genz_hook: Dimanapun kamu berada sekarang — Dia ada di sana juga.
verses.translation_en: He is with you wherever you are, and Allah is Seeing of what you do.

verses.genz_hook: Syukur itu bukan sekadar ucapan. Itu cara nambah nikmat.
verses.translation_en: If you are grateful, I will surely increase you in favor.

verses.genz_hook: Allah tanya ini 31 kali dalam satu surah. Jawab dengan jujur.
verses.translation_en: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.genz_hook: Coba hitung nikmat kamu hari ini. Kamu ga akan bisa selesai.
verses.translation_en: If you tried to count the favors of Allah, you could not enumerate them.

verses.genz_hook: Kamu ingat Allah, Dia ingat kamu. Deal yang paling worth it.
verses.translation_en: So remember Me; I will remember you. And be grateful to Me and do not deny Me.

verses.genz_hook: Keadilan bukan cuma buat orang lain. Kadang harus lawan diri sendiri juga.
verses.translation_en: Be persistently standing firm in justice, witnesses for Allah, even if it be against yourselves.

verses.genz_hook: Agama diturunkan salah satunya supaya manusia bisa tegak dalam keadilan.
verses.translation_en: We sent Our messengers with clear proofs and sent down with them the Scripture and the balance that the people may maintain justice.

verses.genz_hook: Kalau kamu dizalimi — kamu boleh ngomong. Itu bukan dosa.
verses.translation_en: Allah does not like public mention of evil except by one who has been wronged.

verses.genz_hook: Saling jaga, saling ingetin — itu tugas kita satu sama lain.
verses.translation_en: The believing men and believing women are allies of one another. They enjoin what is right and forbid what is wrong.

verses.genz_hook: Allah langsung nyebut Dia bersama orang-orang yang sabar. Langsung.
verses.translation_en: Indeed, Allah is with the patient.

verses.genz_hook: Pahala sabar itu ga ada batasnya. Literally unlimited.
verses.translation_en: Indeed, the patient will be given their reward without account.

verses.genz_hook: Sabar, terus sabar, terus lebih sabar lagi. Bertahap — tapi jangan berhenti.
verses.translation_en: Be patient and persevere and remain stationed and fear Allah that you may be successful.

verses.genz_hook: Kemampuan sabar itu bukan dari kamu sendiri — itu dikasih Allah.
verses.translation_en: And be patient, and your patience is not but through Allah.

verses.genz_hook: Jatuh itu manusiawi. Yang penting bangun dan minta maaf ke Allah.
verses.translation_en: Those who remember Allah and seek forgiveness for their sins — and who forgives sins except Allah?

verses.genz_hook: Taubat yang sungguh-sungguh bisa ubah kegelapan jadi cahaya.
verses.translation_en: Turn to Allah in sincere repentance; perhaps your Lord will remove from you your misdeeds.

verses.genz_hook: Seberapa besar pun dosamu — ini ayat yang harus kamu baca.
verses.translation_en: Whoever does evil or wrongs himself then seeks the forgiveness of Allah will find Allah Forgiving and Merciful.

verses.genz_hook: Pengampunan Allah itu luas banget. Lebih luas dari semua dosamu.
verses.translation_en: I am the Perpetual Forgiver of whoever repents and believes and does righteousness.

verses.genz_hook: Perintah pertama yang turun ke manusia: Baca. Belajar. Pahami.
verses.translation_en: Read in the name of your Lord who created.

verses.genz_hook: Nabi sendiri diperintah minta tambah ilmu. Kamu juga harusnya.
verses.translation_en: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

verses.genz_hook: Ilmu itu yang angkat derajat. Bukan follower count.
verses.translation_en: Allah will raise those who have believed among you and those who were given knowledge, by degrees.

verses.genz_hook: Orang yang tau dan yang ga tau — emang sama? Pikirin.
verses.translation_en: Are those who know equal to those who do not know?

verses.genz_hook: Ngelakuin kebaikan cuma biar dilihat? Ada ayat khusus buat itu.
verses.translation_en: Those who make show of their deeds.

verses.genz_hook: Sedekah yang difollow-up sama pamer — pahalanya hangus.
verses.translation_en: Do not invalidate your charities with reminders or injury as does one who spends his wealth to be seen by the people.

verses.genz_hook: Sombong itu subtle. Bisa kelihatan dari cara jalan dan cara ngomong.
verses.translation_en: Do not turn your cheek in contempt toward people and do not walk through the earth exultantly.

verses.genz_hook: Allah ga suka yang pamer. Dan itu disebut langsung.
verses.translation_en: Allah does not like those who are self-deluding and boastful.

verses.genz_hook: Kalau lagi questioning 'buat apa hidup' — ini jawabannya.
verses.translation_en: I did not create jinn and mankind except to worship Me.

verses.genz_hook: Kamu bukan cuma penumpang di bumi ini. Kamu khalifah.
verses.translation_en: Indeed, I will make upon the earth a successive authority.

verses.genz_hook: Diciptain sia-sia? Allah sendiri yang tanya itu ke kita.
verses.translation_en: Did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned?

verses.genz_hook: Hidup ini ujian. Pertanyaannya bukan seberapa banyak — tapi seberapa baik.
verses.translation_en: He who created death and life to test you as to which of you is best in deed.

verses.genz_hook: Di akhirat, teman dunia bisa jadi musuh — kecuali yang saling bawa kebaikan.
verses.translation_en: Close friends, that day, will be enemies to each other, except for the righteous.

verses.genz_hook: Jaga circle yang inget Allah bareng kamu. Itu harta yang ga ternilai.
verses.translation_en: Keep yourself patient with those who call upon their Lord in the morning and the evening, seeking His face.

verses.genz_hook: Ga ada tempat buat nge-bully dan ngerendahin — even bercanda.
verses.translation_en: Do not let a people ridicule another people; perhaps they may be better than them.

verses.genz_hook: Julid, gossip, stalking gebetan orang — semua ada di ayat ini.
verses.translation_en: Avoid much suspicion; indeed, some suspicion is sin. And do not spy or backbite each other.

verses.genz_hook: Paylater, pinjol, riba — ada konsekuensinya yang serius.
verses.translation_en: Allah has permitted trade and has forbidden interest.

verses.genz_hook: Sedekah itu bukan rugi. Itu investasi dengan return yang ga ada batasnya.
verses.translation_en: If you loan Allah a goodly loan, He will multiply it for you and forgive you.

verses.genz_hook: Selesai sholat — langsung gerak. Rizq itu dijemput, bukan ditunggu.
verses.translation_en: When the prayer has concluded, spread through the land and seek from the bounty of Allah.

verses.genz_hook: Satu hal yang pasti dan ga bisa di-skip: mati.
verses.translation_en: Every soul will taste death, and you will only be given your full compensation on the Day of Resurrection.

verses.genz_hook: Kematian itu sudah tertulis. Persiapannya yang belum.
verses.translation_en: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone.

verses.genz_hook: Hari itu datang. Kamu akan lihat sendiri semua yang kamu perbuat.
verses.translation_en: Indeed, We have warned you of a near punishment on the Day when a man will observe what his hands have put forth.

verses.genz_hook: Sebiji zarah kebaikan pun kelihatan. Ga ada yang hilang.
verses.translation_en: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it.

verses.genz_hook: Dan sebiji zarah keburukan pun kelihatan. Ga ada yang tersembunyi.
verses.translation_en: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.

verses.genz_hook: Nyebut 'ih' ke orang tua pun dilarang. Serius.
verses.translation_en: Your Lord has decreed that you worship none but Him, and that you be kind to parents. Say not to them 'uff.'

verses.genz_hook: Semua yang ibu kamu lalui buat kamu — Allah catat semua.
verses.translation_en: His mother carried him with hardship and gave birth to him with hardship. Be grateful to Me and to your parents.

verses.genz_hook: Doa ini pendek — tapi beratnya luar biasa buat orang tua.
verses.translation_en: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they brought me up when I was small.

verses.theme_label: Signs of Allah in the Universe
verses.genz_hook: Langit dan bumi bukan dekorasi. Itu tanda-tanda buat yang mau mikir.
verses.translation_en: Indeed, in the creation of the heavens and the earth and the alternation of the night and the day are signs for those of understanding.

verses.theme_label: Signs of Allah in the Universe
verses.genz_hook: Rasa tenang di sisi pasangan yang baik — itu tanda kebesaran Allah.
verses.translation_en: He created for you mates that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy.

verses.theme_label: Signs of Allah in the Universe
verses.genz_hook: Matahari dan bulan bergerak dengan hitungan yang presisi banget. Siapa yang ngatur?
verses.translation_en: The sun and the moon follow their calculated courses.

verses.theme_label: Signs of Allah in the Universe
verses.genz_hook: Semua yang hidup — dari air. Sains baru buktiin ini ribuan tahun kemudian.
verses.translation_en: Allah has created every moving creature from water.

verses.genz_hook: Kalau lagi gelisah dan ga tau kenapa — ini yang dibutuhin.
verses.translation_en: Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.

verses.genz_hook: Perbanyak ingat Allah. Bukan cuma pas susah.
verses.translation_en: O you who have believed, remember Allah with much remembrance.

verses.genz_hook: Morning routine yang paling worth: mulai dengan ingat Allah.
verses.translation_en: Remember your Lord within yourself in humility and in fear — morning and evening.

verses.genz_hook: Jaga kejujuran. Bergaul sama orang-orang yang jujur.
verses.translation_en: O you who believe, fear Allah and be with the truthful.

verses.genz_hook: Fear Allah dan ngomong yang bener. Sesimpel itu — dan seberat itu.
verses.translation_en: Fear Allah and speak words of appropriate justice.

verses.genz_hook: Jauhi perkataan palsu. Hoaks, gossip, fitnah — semua masuk kategori ini.
verses.translation_en: Avoid the uncleanliness of idols and avoid false statement.

verses.genz_hook: Ngaku beriman tapi ga mau diuji? Itu ga nyambung.
verses.translation_en: Do the people think that they will be left to say 'We believe' and they will not be tried?

verses.genz_hook: Orang-orang sebelum kamu juga diuji. Bahkan lebih berat. Dan mereka bertahan.
verses.translation_en: Or do you think you will enter Paradise while such trial has not yet come to you as came to those who passed before you?

verses.genz_hook: Kesenangan juga ujian. Bukan cuma kesulitan.
verses.translation_en: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned.

verses.genz_hook: Allah sendiri yang minta kamu berdoa. Dan Dia janji bakal jawab.
verses.translation_en: Call upon Me; I will respond to you.

verses.genz_hook: Di titik paling gelap, waktu ga ada yang bisa bantu — siapa yang dengerin?
verses.translation_en: Who responds to the desperate when he calls upon Him and removes evil?

verses.genz_hook: Doa yang paling makbul: yang rendah hati dan tulus, bukan yang keras-keras.
verses.translation_en: Call upon your Lord in humility and privately; indeed, He does not like transgressors.

verses.genz_hook: Satu ayat yang kamu ulang 17 kali sehari. Tapi sudah sungguh-sungguh belum?
verses.translation_en: It is You we worship and You we ask for help.

verses.genz_hook: Sepertiga Al-Qur'an dalam satu surah. Simpel. Absolut.
verses.translation_en: Say: He is Allah, the One.

verses.genz_hook: Semua rugi, kecuali yang ini. Cek checklist kamu hari ini.
verses.translation_en: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.

verses.genz_hook: Ayat paling agung dalam Al-Qur'an. Baca sebelum tidur.
verses.translation_en: Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence.

verses.genz_hook: Pemuda yang lari dari kedzaliman sambil tetap pegang iman — itu Ashabul Kahfi.
verses.translation_en: Our Lord, grant us from Yourself mercy and prepare for us from our affair right guidance.

verses.genz_hook: Doa Nabi Adam pas ngerasa udah beneran salah besar.
verses.translation_en: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers.

verses.genz_hook: Doa paling balance: minta kebaikan dunia, akhirat, dan perlindungan dari neraka.
verses.translation_en: Our Lord, give us in this world that which is good and in the Hereafter that which is good and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

verses.genz_hook: Buat yang udah nikah atau mau nikah — doa ini yang dijaga.
verses.translation_en: Our Lord, grant us from among our wives and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us an example for the righteous.

verses.genz_hook: Yang kamu benci mungkin justru yang terbaik buat kamu. Allah yang tau.
verses.translation_en: Perhaps you dislike a thing and it is good for you; and perhaps you love a thing and it is bad for you. Allah knows, while you know not.

verses.genz_hook: Manusia berencana, Allah yang menentukan. Dan rencana-Nya selalu lebih baik.
verses.translation_en: They plan, and Allah plans. And Allah is the best of planners.

verses.genz_hook: Nikmat dari Allah, musibah — coba evaluasi dirimu dulu.
verses.translation_en: What comes to you of good is from Allah, but what comes to you of evil is from yourself.

verses.genz_hook: Ga ada musibah yang terjadi tanpa izin Allah. Dan orang yang beriman — hatinya tetap tenang.
verses.translation_en: No disaster strikes except by permission of Allah. And whoever believes in Allah — He will guide his heart.

verses.genz_hook: Suara keras bukan tanda kuat. Bahkan suara keledai disebut paling buruk.
verses.translation_en: Be moderate in your pace and lower your voice; indeed, the most disagreeable of sounds is the voice of donkeys.

verses.genz_hook: Ciri hamba Allah yang sejati: jalan dengan tenang, ngomong damai.
verses.translation_en: The servants of the Most Merciful are those who walk upon the earth easily, and when the ignorant address them harshly, they say words of peace.

verses.genz_hook: Scroll TikTok liat berita — tabayyun dulu sebelum share. Ini perintah Allah.
verses.translation_en: O you who have believed, if there comes to you a disobedient one with information, investigate.

verses.genz_hook: Al-Qur'an itu GPS kehidupan. Tinggal mau dibuka atau enggak.
verses.translation_en: This Quran guides to that which is most suitable and gives good tidings.

verses.genz_hook: Al-Qur'an itu obat. Bukan metafora — literally penyembuh.
verses.translation_en: We send down the Quran as a healing and mercy for the believers.

verses.genz_hook: Orang yang beriman punya cahaya yang jalan sama mereka. Mau itu?
verses.translation_en: He will appoint for you a light by which you will walk and will forgive you.

verses.genz_hook: Ga ada keraguan di dalamnya. Petunjuk buat yang mau bertaqwa.
verses.translation_en: This is the Book about which there is no doubt, a guidance for those conscious of Allah.
